title: Grasslands
description: Fabric client-side mod that improves vanilla grass blocks with extra grass blades
body:
Fabric client-side mod that improves vanilla grass blocks with extra grass blades.

<iframe
  width="560"
  height="420"
  src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TeOye_H_j34"
  title="YouTube video player"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>

Every part of this mod is configurable through an ingame menu so wether you like faster winds or darker blades it's all doable from right within Minecraft.
